title: Fabric + Foundry AI Agent
description: Deploy a complete Fabric data foundation, publish a Fabric data agent over it, then provision a Microsoft Foundry agent grounded on that data — the full data + AI story in one click.
prerequisites: Fabric capacity (F2+, Trial, or PPU) — same tenant as Foundry
Azure subscription with Microsoft Foundry quota for gpt-4o-mini
Tenant setting 'cross-geo processing & storing for AI' enabled
Owner or Contributor + User Access Administrator on the resource group

azureParams.name: subscription_id
azureParams.label: Subscription
azureParams.description: Azure subscription that will host the Foundry resource.

azureParams.name: resource_group
azureParams.label: Resource Group
azureParams.description: Resource group for the Foundry account (created if missing).

azureParams.name: azure_location
azureParams.label: Azure Region
azureParams.description: Region for the Foundry account + model deployment (must have gpt-4o-mini quota).
